mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: first valid rising clock edge after vdd_sense crosses vpor
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_POR_STARTUP mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=startup_delay_bypassed

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: reference error requires increasing trim code
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_TRIM_SEARCH mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=trim_direction_reversed

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: first in-tolerance enabled update before three stable updates
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_READY_QUALIFICATION mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=premature_ready

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: temperature proxy sweep should produce the declared PTAT/CTAT reference metric
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_CORE_REFERENCE mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=core_reference_wrong

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: reset or POR occurs after nonzero trim and ready state
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_RESET_BROWNOUT_CLEAR mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=reset_state_not_cleared
